title: Torenia perennans
intro: Torenia perennans, also known as the blue sky flower or Chinese torenia, is a perennial flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Linderniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Torenia perennans include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
